title: Holyy Optimized (Pvp&Fps)
description: This is the BEST pvp and optimizations modpack which have all of the required mods, u will get approx around 300 fps- 500 fps if u follow the settings and add all the mods.
body:
****This modpack focuses on performance and optimization. It includes mods to:

Improve FPS and reduce lag
Optimize world generation and rendering
Keep the game stable on low- and mid-end PCs

Perfect for players who want fast, smooth, and responsive Minecraft with essential quality-of-life improvements. Credits : thank all of u guys for making such amzaing mods and these mods arent mine please if u wanna thank someone for the mods go on the profile of the mods creators, if u have ANY questions or issue reqarding this modpack dm me in discord / my username: just._.dizzy
